Name: Ankou
Lore: The personification of death who collects souls.

Name: Apsat
Lore: God of birds and fish; protects hunters.

Name: Banshee
Lore: Spirit whose wailing foretells a death.

Name: Barbegazi
Lore: Mountain men with giant snowshoe feet.

Name: Barstukas
Lore: Tiny earth men living under elder trees.

Name: Basajaun
Lore: Lord of the Forest; taught humans agriculture.

Name: Bean-nighe
Lore: Washer at the ford who cleans bloodied shrouds.

Name: Haltija
Lore: Guardian spirit of people or homes.

Name: Kikimora
Lore: Helpful or chaotic female house spirit.

Name: Manticore
Lore: Human face, lion body, scorpion tail.
